videos.title: HTML Fieldset & Legend Elements Explained
videos.description: Learn how to use the HTML fieldset and legend elements to group form controls, improve accessibility, and organize your forms effectively.

videos.title: Accessible Form Grouping with Fieldset and Legend
videos.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates how to create accessible forms using fieldset and legend elements, with practical examples and styling techniques.

videos.title: HTML Forms: Fieldset, Legend, and Form Accessibility
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial on HTML form structure including fieldset, legend, labels, and accessibility best practices for screen readers.

videos.title: Building Forms in HTML — Fieldset and Legend Tutorial
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers form structure with fieldset and legend, including styling, disabled states, and nested fieldset patterns.

videos.title: HTML Form Elements — Fieldset, Legend, Label Deep Dive
videos.description: Deep dive into HTML form elements with a focus on fieldset and legend for organizing complex forms with multiple sections.

videos.title: CSS Styling for Fieldset and Legend
videos.description: Learn how to style fieldsets and legends with CSS, reset default browser styles, and create custom form section designs.

videos.title: Form Accessibility: Why Fieldset and Legend Matter
videos.description: Explanation of why fieldset and legend are critical for screen reader users and how they improve form usability and compliance.
